case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. RANDI TANKSLEY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANKSLEY, RANDI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1906 SUNNYDALE AVE., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LARSEN, TIMQUIN SUBSTITUTED FOR RAMSEY, CHARLES TILLMAN AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TANKSLEY, RANDI
